feedback.text: I miss some topics that are also directly or indirectly linked to digital fairness. 1. The planned obsolescence of video game. Currently developers try to make games that they don't want to support anymore unable to be played even single players games. You paid for a product but don't own it. While it is easy to prevent this by being to use private servers or removing the drm/always online components of those games. 2. The power of payment processers. Companies like visa and mastercard currently have to much power in this space and can force companies to stop selling LEGAL products that the payment processers don't agree with.
